_description: Recommended MCP servers for Darkroom projects. Copy these into ~/.claude.json under 'mcpServers'.

context7._description: Live documentation lookup. Essential for getting current API docs instead of outdated training data.
context7._usage: Triggered by: 'how to use X', 'X docs', 'api reference for Y'

github._description: GitHub integration for issues, PRs, projects, and repos. Enables agents to read/update issues, manage project boards, and track work.
github._usage: Project management, issue tracking, PR creation, code review
github._note: Alternative: use 'gh' CLI directly via Bash (no MCP server needed, lower context cost). The MCP server adds structured tool access but consumes more context.

vercel._description: Vercel deployment management. View deployments, logs, environment variables.
vercel._usage: Deploy, check build status, view logs, manage env vars

memory._description: Persistent memory across sessions. Stores facts, preferences, and context.
memory._usage: Remember project decisions, user preferences, learned patterns
